chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 552 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of bail application 11.09.2023 Mr. Rameez Ali Chhajro, Advocate for applicant along with applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General. Mr. Inam Ali Larik, Advocate has filed power on behalf of complainant, which is taken on record..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J. – As per FIR, applicant and other 05 co-accused, duly armed with weapons, barged into house of complainant on 16.07.2023, were identified in solar light and tried to abduct her niece Mst. Kalsoom, but on her cries, they left her and went away, hence FIR. 2. Applicant’s Counsel submits that on account of a dispute over land, this false FIR has been registered, the story of which does not appeal to the common sense. 3. Learned Counsel for the complainant has opposed bail to applicant so also learned DPG. 4. Notwithstanding, this is a case of an attempt to abduct. Applicant is an aged person and hardly able to walk, hence, allegation of attempting to abduct niece of complainant, aged about 20/21 years, and then leaving her on cries requires further inquiry, and his false implication in view of the fact that parties are resident of same area cannot be ruled out. Cr. Bail App. No. S – 552 of 2023 Page 2 of 2 5. Accordingly, this application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail already granted to applicant, vide order dated 17.08.2023, is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. 6. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial Court while deciding the case on merits.

Accordingly, this application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail already granted to applicant, vide order dated 17.08.2023, is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. 6. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial Court while deciding the case on merits. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
